response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and web software developer with strong general engineering craftsmanship, but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator or GPU architecture work, or deep-learning workload performance analysis. His closest relevant experience is low-latency backend services in DLang and some C/C++ tooling work, which is systems-adjacent but far from silicon-level performance architecture at a Principal level.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Broad polyglot background including C, C++, and DLang alongside web stacks
15+ years of professional experience, exceeding the BS + 8 years qualification bar
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling, hardware architecture, or performance-modeling experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU workload analysis background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, misaligned with a Principal hardware performance IC role

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware co-design experience
No AI accelerator, GPU, or DL workload optimization background
